message:
test(bd-1fnm): add unit tests for testing/context, timing, assertions

Cover untested branches across three testing utility modules:
- context.rs: Default, Debug, Clone, with_budget_ms, cx accessors, mcp_context_with_state (6 new → 12 total)
- timing.rs: Stopwatch stopped/default/since_last_lap/total_lap_time/debug/clone, TimingStats debug/clone, Timer from_secs/debug/clone, empty report (9 new → 18 total)
- assertions.rs: assert_json_rpc_error with None code, assert_mcp_compliant for tools/call, resources/list, resources/read, resources/templates/list, prompts/list, prompts/get, error early-return, unknown method, assert_content_valid for image/audio/resource/unknown, assert_tool_valid without inputSchema (14 new → 25 total)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
